name: gw
description: Unified Google Workspace and operations gateway with audited JSON outputs, including secure vault, container sandbox controls, and Apify-backed news retrieval.
capability_summary: Unified gateway for Google Workspace and external services. Use for Gmail (send/list), Drive (upload/share), Docs (formatting/markdown), Sheets (logging), Calendar (scheduling), Chat, News (search/trending), plus vault secrets and sandboxed execution.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Top-level selector (gmail, drive, docs, sheets, calendar, chat, tasks, youtube, analytics, forms, ads, news, maps, env, vault, sandbox).

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Service command to execute (examples: send, list, upload, share, set, get, run).

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional CLI flags/values passed through to gw commands.

subcommands.name: gmail send
subcommands.description: Send an email message via Gmail with recipient, subject, body, and optional attachments.

subcommands.name: gmail list
subcommands.description: List Gmail messages with optional filters and pagination controls.

subcommands.name: drive upload
subcommands.description: Upload a local file to Google Drive with optional folder selection.

subcommands.name: drive share
subcommands.description: Grant Drive file permissions with strict role controls.

subcommands.name: docs append
subcommands.description: Append plain text or markdown content to an existing Google Doc.

subcommands.name: sheets append
subcommands.description: Write values into a spreadsheet range for logging and tracking.

subcommands.name: calendar create
subcommands.description: Create calendar events with start/end times and attendee support.

subcommands.name: chat send
subcommands.description: Send messages to Google Chat spaces for notifications and updates.

subcommands.name: news search
subcommands.description: Search real-time news via Apify actor integration using vault-managed API token.

subcommands.name: news trending
subcommands.description: Fetch trending headline bundles via Apify actor integration.

subcommands.name: vault set
subcommands.description: Encrypt and store secret values using the LSL master key.

subcommands.name: vault get
subcommands.description: Decrypt and return a secret value by key.

subcommands.name: sandbox run
subcommands.description: Execute a shell command in an ephemeral Docker container with restricted resources.

flags.name: --help
flags.description: Show command help and available usage patterns.

flags.name: --version
flags.description: Show gateway CLI version and active service inventory.

flags.name: --json
flags.description: Emit structured JSON output for machine/agent consumption (default output mode).
